So, your answer must include a single number, not a range! This answer should be the most accurate point estimate. Feel free to also provide some justification for your answer.

Justification: I estimate roughly 980 million people in 1800, averaging about 2.2 minutes per person per day looking through a window, after accounting for limited window access in many regions.  
Calculation: \(980{,}000{,}000 \times 365 \times 2.2 / 1440 \approx 540{,}000{,}000\) human-days.
